title: What kind of offshore teams can Virtual Sys build?
desc: We assemble cross-functional squads covering product managers, UI/UX designers, full-stack engineers, QA, and DevOps. Engagements can start with a focused pod of 4–6 specialists and scale into multi-team programs with dedicated leadership and delivery governance.

title: How quickly can we onboard a dedicated team?
desc: Once scopes and security requirements are signed off, we typically ramp within 2–4 weeks. During that window we align on tooling, sprint cadences, and communication workflows so your onshore stakeholders are fully integrated from day one.

title: Which industries do you have domain experience in?
desc: Our teams support B2B SaaS, fintech, healthtech, logistics, and enterprise transformation programs. We pair industry SMEs with technologists so compliance, data protection, and integration patterns are built into the solution from the start.
